name: cosmos
description: OctoBus package for Chaitin Cosmos (万象) log search, log detail, and aggregation statistics APIs via Pedestal JSON-RPC.

Chaitin_COSMOS.Chaitin_COSMOS/SearchLogI.name: search-log-info
Chaitin_COSMOS.Chaitin_COSMOS/SearchLogI.description: Get Cosmos log detail by IDs.

Chaitin_COSMOS.Chaitin_COSMOS/SearchLogL.name: search-log-list
Chaitin_COSMOS.Chaitin_COSMOS/SearchLogL.description: Search Cosmos log list with filters.
